name: OIDC RBAC
description: Advanced OIDC authentication with role-based library access control
overview: OpenID Connect SSO with role-to-library mapping, multi-provider support, and admin UI.

versions.changelog:
Add profile-image sync from the OIDC picture claim

On each login, when enabled per provider, read the picture claim (ID token,
access token, then userinfo) and set it as the user's Jellyfin avatar. Adds a
per-provider Picture Claim field and Sync profile image toggle. Avatar download
and save failures never block login.
